## Positioning
- Atlas v2 grounds answers in the Frontier handbook, so managers trust responses.
- Region-aware citations prevent policy drift between Seoul and Singapore.
- Optimized for HR and procurement flows before general knowledge Q&A.

## Copy
Atlas v2 is how the Frontier Labs team gets answers to real policy questions fast. Ask in Korean or English; see a citation to the exact handbook section; act with confidence.

Built for managers and finance ops who need to move quickly without waiting on a people-operations ticket, Atlas v2 respects per-region policy variants from day one.

## Engineering plan
1. Infrastructure: deploy Sonnet-backed agent with prompt-caching.
2. Data: index handbook variants per region with BM25.
3. Evaluation: launch faithfulness rubric against 50-case gold set.
4. Rollout: gated launch to Seoul, then Singapore two weeks later.
